decks.notes: The deck focuses on utilizing Allosaurus Rider to quickly ramp into powerful threats like Griselbrand and Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant. The deck utilizes cards like Neoform and Eldritch Evolution to search for key combo pieces and generate advantage. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Pact of Negation and Veil of Summer provide protection and disruption against opponents. The deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with its powerful threats. It also has some utility cards like Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Bridgeworks Battle to enable additional synergies and flexibility in gameplay.

This deck aims to flood the board with aggressive creatures, such as Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, while using cards like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment for damage output. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury provide additional support and can take control of the game. Seasoned Pyromancer and Thraben Charm offer flexibility and card advantage. Arena of Glory boosts the team's power, and Elegant Parlor provides protection. Ranger-Captain of Eos helps tutor for key pieces, while Voice of Victory and Ocelot Pride add resilience and a finishing touch. Blood Moon disrupts opponents' mana bases.

This deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and quick removal spells. By utilizing efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Scion of Draco, along with powerful spells like Lightning Bolt and Stubborn Denial, the deck aims to quickly reduce the opponent's life total while controlling the board. The Leyline cards and Leyline Binding provide additional support by enhancing the creatures and disrupting the opponent's strategy. The deck also includes cards like Teferi, Time Raveler for added versatility and Consign to Memory for additional removal options.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through countering opponent's spells, removing threats from the board, and utilizing card advantage to gain a strategic edge. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan using counterspells and removal spells while generating card advantage through card draw and graveyard recursion. By efficiently managing resources and controlling the flow of the game, the deck aims to outlast and outmaneuver the opponent until it can establish a winning position. The strategy revolves around maintaining control over the game and dictating the pace of play.

This deck focuses on utilizing the Amulet of Vigor to generate explosive mana ramping capabilities, allowing for the quick deployment of powerful threats such as Primeval Titan. The deck includes various lands and spells that help facilitate this strategy, including Crumbling Vestige and Lotus Field. By accelerating mana production and utilizing cards like Scapeshift, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with massive board presence and quickly close out games through the combo potential of Amulet Titan.

This Boros Aggro deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a combination of aggressive creatures and burn spells. The focus is on quickly establishing a board presence with creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, while also having access to burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to finish off opponents or clear blockers. The inclusion of Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Arena of Glory provides additional support and protection for the creatures, allowing for quick and efficient victories. The deck also includes some versatile utility cards like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Seasoned Pyromancer for added flexibility.

The deck focuses on utilizing Broodscale Bloodchief's ability to sacrifice creatures and generate mana to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End. The deck also includes cards like Eldrazi Temple and Urza's Saga to ramp up mana quickly while controlling the board with cards like Glaring Fleshraker and Malevolent Rumble. The combination of sacrificing creatures, generating mana, and casting powerful Eldrazi allows the deck to quickly overwhelm opponents and create a dominant board presence.

This deck utilizes the discard mechanic to rapidly empty the hand and fill the graveyard, allowing for the quick and efficient summoning of powerful creatures and dealing damage to the opponent. By utilizing cards like Burning Inquiry and Faithless Looting, the deck aims to get creatures like Hollow One and Detective's Phoenix onto the battlefield for aggressive plays. Additionally, cards like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Nethergoyf offer additional ways to apply pressure on the opponent, making it a fast-paced and aggressive deck capable of overwhelming opponents quickly.

This deck focuses on utilizing a combination of cards that allow for a quick and explosive win condition without relying on traditional land cards. By utilizing cards like Goblin Charbelcher and Lotus Bloom, along with counter spells like Disrupting Shoal and Flare of Denial, the deck aims to control the board and disrupt the opponent while setting up for a game-winning combo. With a mix of control cards and combo pieces, the deck aims to outmaneuver opponents and secure victory through clever plays and strategic decision-making.

This deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and powerful spells. It utilizes a mix of red, green, white, blue, and black cards to maintain control of the game and apply constant pressure. Leyline cards provide additional support for the creatures, while Lightning Bolt and other removal spells help clear the way for attacks. Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Territorial Kavu are key creatures in this strategy, supported by Leyline of the Guildpact and Leyline Binding to ensure dominance on the battlefield. This deck aims to quickly defeat the opponent through a combination of speed and versatility.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling a board of artifacts and using them to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. By utilizing cards like Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble to generate mana and card advantage, as well as cards like Pinnacle Emissary and Kappa Cannoneer to pressure the opponent, the deck aims to close out the game before the opponent can stabilize. With a strong artifact theme and disruptive elements like Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke, the deck aims to maintain a fast pace and keep the opponent on the back foot throughout the game.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on fast and efficient damage output through creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Slickshot Show-Off, as well as burn spells like Lava Dart and Lightning Bolt. It aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly with low-cost spells and aggressive creatures while also maintaining card advantage with Mishra's Bauble and Expressive Iteration. The deck also includes some utility cards like Surgical Extraction for disruption and Violent Urge for additional damage. The key strategy is to apply constant pressure and finish off the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and powerful creatures to disrupt the opponent's strategy while generating card advantage. The deck utilizes a mix of powerful creatures like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer alongside control elements like Consign to Memory and Wrath of the Skies to maintain board control and outvalue the opponent. The deck also includes card draw and selection to ensure consistent access to necessary resources and answers.

This deck focuses on quickly flooding the board with artifacts and using them to generate value and disruption. It combines the Affinity mechanic with aggressive strategies to overwhelm opponents and control the pace of the game. The deck utilises various artifacts and efficient creatures to increase its power on the board while disrupting the opponent's strategies with cards like Urza's Saga and Engineered Explosives. By utilizing artifacts and synergistic interactions, the deck aims to create a fast-paced and versatile playstyle that can adapt to different matchups effectively.

This deck focuses on aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phage, Titan of Fire's Fury to quickly pressure the opponent while disrupting their game plan with cards like Teferi, Time Raveler and Prismatic Ending. The deck also utilizes cards like Consign to Memory and Solitude for removal and protection to maintain board control. With a mix of creatures, control spells, and disruption, the deck aims to constantly apply pressure while disrupting the opponent's strategy to secure a win in the 1 vs 1 format.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creature plays, utilizing cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Seasoned Pyromancer to deal damage quickly to the opponent. The deck also includes support cards like Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge for additional damage output. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah can provide a powerful boost to the team, while The Legend of Roku offers versatility in combat. With a mix of efficient creatures, removal spells, and burn spells, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy in Modern 1 vs 1 matches.
